title: Claude Code Skill: Postman Collection Builder — Convert API Docs or Specs into Ready-to-Run Postman Collections
description: For solutions engineers and technical support teams, this skill transforms OpenAPI specs, markdown API documentation, or raw endpoint lists into fully structured Postman collections with example payloads and environment variables so they can onboard clients and reproduce issues faster without manual collection setup.
gumroad_description:
Manually rebuilding Postman collections from API docs wastes hours you don't have.

Who this is for:
— Solutions engineers setting up client environments from OpenAPI specs
— Technical support teams who need to reproduce issues without manual collection setup
— Backend developers who want a shareable Postman collection on every API release

What's inside:
— 1 ready-to-use SKILL.md file — drop into your project's skills/ folder
— Converts OpenAPI specs, markdown docs, or raw endpoint lists into full Postman collections
— Includes example payloads and environment variable scaffolding
— Usage guide + real slash-command examples

Spec in. Working collection out. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
